description: Host your Dash Masternode on the Flux Network (HA: 2 redundant nodes with automatic failover)
name: DashMN

userEnvironmentParameters.name: KEY
userEnvironmentParameters.placeholder: Enter your operator BLS private key

userEnvironmentParameters.name: PROTXHASH
userEnvironmentParameters.description: Your masternode registration hash (proTxHash). Enables automatic on-chain IP updates so the node is never PoSe-banned after a relocation.
